task: Check status on baggage reimbursement claim. Case number C-130009-K8N5, Property Irregularity Report CPHLH52532. Passenger Alex Abell, flight November 29 2025 Munich to Copenhagen to Chicago to Knoxville, Lufthansa flight LH2440. Bags were delayed 6 days in Copenhagen, delivered December 5. All receipts were submitted March 1 2026 totaling over $550 in replacement clothing plus taxi and Uber costs. Lufthansa acknowledged the case March 18 but said it was still in line for processing. It has now been 4 months with no payment. I need a specific timeline for when reimbursement will be issued. If they cannot provide one, I will be filing a US DOT complaint and pursuing rights under EU Regulation EC 261/2004 and the Montreal Convention.
reference: Case C-130009-K8N5 | PIR CPHLH52532 | Feedback ID 42383344 | Baggage Receipt 0220596739

transcript.text: Hi, this is Debra calling on behalf of Alex Abell. Check status on baggage reimbursement claim.
This call may be recorded for quality assurance. We have a special promotion today for select callers. If you are over 50, please press 1 now. If not, press 2.
I need to speak with someone about a...
If you are over 50, please press 1 now. If not, press 2.
I need to speak with someone regarding a baggage reimbursement...
I'm sorry, I didn't understand your response. Please press 5 to continue.
